hackathon: QVAC Hackathon I - Unleash Edge AI

local_apis.purpose: Local on-device AI inference, embeddings, and RAG

network_usage.description: Zero remote API calls during normal operation.
network_usage.model_download: Models are downloaded once from QVAC distributed registry via HTTPS during first loadModel() call, then cached locally.
network_usage.p2p: Future versions may use QVAC Holepunch for P2P delegation (no central servers).

note: This application is designed for complete offline operation. All AI inference, embeddings, and vector search run locally on the device GPU/CPU. No user data, prompts, or documents are transmitted to any remote server.
